png-to-jpg.intro: This PNG to JPG converter helps you convert PNG images into JPG format to reduce file size and improve compatibility across devices.
png-to-jpg.note: Transparent areas in PNG images will be replaced with a white background.

jpg-to-png.intro: This JPG to PNG converter allows you to convert JPG images into PNG format, which supports transparency and lossless quality.
jpg-to-png.note: Image quality remains the same; only the file format changes.

heic-to-jpg.intro: This HEIC to JPG converter converts Apple HEIC images into universally supported JPG format for easy sharing and viewing.
heic-to-jpg.note: Image quality is preserved during conversion.

webp-to-jpg.intro: This WEBP to JPG converter helps convert WEBP images into JPG format for better compatibility with older browsers and apps.
webp-to-jpg.note: Minimal compression is applied to maintain image quality.

video-to-mp3.intro: This Video to MP3 converter extracts high-quality audio from video files and saves it as an MP3 file.
video-to-mp3.note: Only audio is extracted; video content is not retained.

mp4-to-mp3.intro: This MP4 to MP3 converter allows you to convert MP4 video files into MP3 audio files for music or podcasts.

csv-to-json.intro: This CSV to JSON converter transforms CSV data into structured JSON format, making it easier to use in APIs and applications.
csv-to-json.note: Large or complex CSV files may require cleanup before conversion.

json-to-csv.intro: This JSON to CSV converter converts JSON data into a CSV file for spreadsheets and data analysis.
json-to-csv.note: Nested JSON structures are flattened into rows and columns.

kb-to-mb.intro: This KB to MB converter converts kilobytes into megabytes using standard data size calculations.
kb-to-mb.note: Supports decimal values for precise results.

mb-to-gb.intro: This MB to GB converter helps you convert megabytes into gigabytes quickly and accurately.

cm-to-inch.intro: This CM to Inch converter converts centimeters into inches instantly using accurate conversion formulas.
cm-to-inch.note: Commonly used in design, construction, and education.

inch-to-cm.intro: This Inch to CM converter converts inches into centimeters with instant and accurate results.

fahrenheit-to-celsius.intro: This Fahrenheit to Celsius converter converts temperatures from Fahrenheit to Celsius accurately.
fahrenheit-to-celsius.note: Useful for travel, education, and science.

celsius-to-fahrenheit.intro: This Celsius to Fahrenheit converter converts temperatures from Celsius to Fahrenheit instantly.
celsius-to-fahrenheit.note: Based on the standard temperature conversion formula.

currency-converter.intro: This Currency Converter helps convert one currency into another using available exchange rates.
currency-converter.note: Live rates require an active internet connection.

stopwatch.intro: This online stopwatch helps you measure elapsed time accurately with start, pause, resume, and reset options. Ideal for sports, workouts, studying, and productivity tracking.
stopwatch.formula: Elapsed Time = End Time − Start Time
stopwatch.note: The stopwatch runs in real time directly in your browser without installation.

countdown.intro: This countdown timer lets you set a specific time and counts down to zero. Perfect for workouts, cooking, exams, presentations, and focus sessions.
countdown.formula: Remaining Time = Set Duration − Elapsed Time
countdown.note: Keep the browser tab active for uninterrupted countdown alerts.

pomodoro-timer.intro: This Pomodoro Timer helps improve focus using timed work and break sessions, typically 25 minutes of work followed by short breaks.
pomodoro-timer.formula: Productivity Cycle = Focus Time + Break Time
pomodoro-timer.note: You can customize work and break durations based on your routine.

interval-timer.intro: This interval timer alternates between work and rest intervals, making it ideal for HIIT workouts, training routines, and structured time sessions.
interval-timer.formula: Total Time = (Work Interval + Rest Interval) × Number of Rounds
interval-timer.note: Sound alerts notify you when intervals change.

alarm-clock.intro: This online alarm clock allows you to set alarms directly in your browser without downloading any app. Useful for reminders and time alerts.
alarm-clock.formula: Alarm Trigger Time = Current Time + Set Delay
alarm-clock.note: The alarm will ring as long as the browser tab remains open.

time-zone-converter.intro: This time zone converter helps you convert time between different global time zones, making scheduling meetings across regions easy.
time-zone-converter.formula: Converted Time = Original Time ± Time Zone Offset
time-zone-converter.note: Daylight saving time is automatically considered.

world-clock.intro: The world clock shows current time in multiple cities worldwide in real time, helping travelers and remote teams stay synchronized.
world-clock.formula: Local Time = UTC Time + City Offset
world-clock.note: Times update automatically without page refresh.

unix-timestamp-converter.intro: This Unix timestamp converter converts Unix time into human-readable dates and vice versa. Commonly used by developers and system engineers.
unix-timestamp-converter.note: Time zone offsets are handled correctly during conversion.

age-in-hours.intro: The Age in Hours Calculator helps you find how many total hours you have lived based on your date of birth.
age-in-hours.note: Results are calculated accurately using standard date and time differences.

work-hours-calculator.intro: The Work Hours Calculator helps calculate total working hours for daily, weekly, or custom time periods.
work-hours-calculator.note: Useful for payroll estimation, freelancers, and time tracking.

meeting-time-finder.intro: The Meeting Time Finder helps identify the best meeting time across multiple time zones.
meeting-time-finder.note: Ideal for remote teams and international collaboration.

sunrise-sunset.intro: The Sunrise and Sunset tool shows accurate sunrise and sunset times for any location worldwide.
sunrise-sunset.note: Times are based on standard astronomical calculations.

season-calculator.intro: The Season Calculator determines the current season based on date and hemisphere.
season-calculator.note: Useful for education, agriculture, and seasonal planning.

timer-split-laps.intro: The Lap Timer allows you to record and track lap times during a single timing session.
timer-split-laps.note: Commonly used for sports, workouts, and practice sessions.

reverse-timer.intro: The Reverse Timer counts time backward visually from a selected duration.
reverse-timer.note: Perfect for presentations, workouts, and timed activities.

time-adder.intro: The Time Adder tool adds multiple time durations together accurately.
time-adder.note: Helpful for billing, work tracking, and scheduling.

time-subtractor.intro: The Time Subtractor calculates the difference between two time values.
time-subtractor.note: Handles hours, minutes, and seconds precisely.

alarm-sound-tester.intro: The Alarm Sound Tester lets you preview alarm sounds before setting them.
alarm-sound-tester.note: Ensures correct volume and sound selection.

image-resize.intro: The Image Resizer allows you to resize images while maintaining quality and aspect ratio.
image-resize.note: Works directly in your browser without uploading files permanently.

image-compress.intro: The Image Compressor reduces image file size while keeping visual quality intact.
image-compress.note: Helps improve website speed and save storage space.

image-crop.intro: The Image Cropper helps remove unwanted areas from images easily.
image-crop.note: Supports common aspect ratios without quality loss.

image-rotate.intro: The Image Rotator rotates images to the desired orientation instantly.

image-flip.intro: The Image Flipper flips images horizontally or vertically in one click.

image-convert.intro: The Image Converter converts images between popular formats like JPG, PNG, and WEBP.

qr-code.intro: The QR Code Generator creates scannable QR codes for links, text, and contact details.

color-picker.intro: The Color Picker helps identify and copy HEX, RGB, and HSL color codes.

text-to-speech.intro: The Text to Speech tool converts written text into natural-sounding audio.
text-to-speech.note: Helpful for learning, accessibility, and content creation.

speech-to-text.intro: The Speech to Text tool converts spoken words into written text in real time.
speech-to-text.note: Accuracy depends on microphone quality and clarity.

random-number.intro: The Random Number Generator creates random numbers within a selected range.
random-number.note: Useful for games, education, and simulations.

random-string.intro: The Random String Generator creates random combinations of letters and numbers.
random-string.note: Useful for passwords, tokens, and testing.

ip-finder.intro: The IP Finder displays your public IP address and basic network information.
ip-finder.note: Only publicly available data is shown.

url-encoder.intro: The URL Encoder converts URLs into a safe, web-compatible format.
url-encoder.note: Useful for APIs and web development.

url-decoder.intro: The URL Decoder converts encoded URLs back into readable format.
url-decoder.note: Instant decoding with no data storage.

text-counter.intro: This text counter tool helps you instantly count characters, words, and text length for writing, SEO, and academic purposes.
text-counter.note: Useful for writers, students, and marketers to analyze content length accurately.

json-beautifier.intro: This JSON beautifier formats raw or minified JSON into a clean, readable structure for easy debugging and development.
json-beautifier.note: Ideal for developers working with APIs and JSON-based data.

base64-encoder.intro: This Base64 encoder converts text or data into Base64 format for safe transmission and storage.
base64-encoder.note: Base64 encoding is not encryption and should not be used for securing sensitive data.

base64-decoder.intro: This Base64 decoder converts Base64 encoded data back into its original readable format.
base64-decoder.note: Useful for developers decoding API responses and encoded strings.

color-code-converter.intro: This color code converter allows you to convert colors between HEX, RGB, and HSL formats instantly.
color-code-converter.note: Helpful for designers and developers to maintain consistent color schemes.

notes-app.intro: This online notes app lets you quickly write, edit, and manage notes directly in your browser.
notes-app.note: Notes are stored locally in your browser and are not synced across devices.

clipboard-viewer.intro: This clipboard viewer displays the current content copied to your clipboard in real time.
clipboard-viewer.note: Clipboard access requires user permission and no data is stored.

timezone-info.intro: This time zone info tool shows the current time across different regions and time zones worldwide.
timezone-info.note: Useful for remote teams, travelers, and international scheduling.
